title: Category of abelian groups
body:
In mathematics, the category 
  
    
      
        
          A
          b
        
      
    
    {\displaystyle \mathbf {Ab} }
  
 has the abelian groups as objects and group homomorphisms as morphisms. This is the prototype of an abelian category: indeed, every small abelian category can be embedded in 
  
    
      
        
          A
          b
        
      
    
    {\displaystyle \mathbf {Ab} }
  
.
